[[File:Zaryte crossbow detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''Zaryte crossbow''' is a [[ranged weapon]] that requires a [[Ranged]] level of 80 to wield, and can fire up to [[dragon bolts]]. The crossbow has an [[attack range]] of 8, and the longrange combat style will increase it by 2. It is only outclassed by the [[dragon hunter crossbow]] when fighting [[draconic]] monsters. This item counts as a [[Zaros]] item in the [[God Wars Dungeon]].

The crossbow itself is crafted by attaching a [[nihil horn]], obtained as a rare drop from [[Nex]], with an [[Armadyl crossbow]] and 250 [[nihil shard]]s. The Zaryte crossbow counts as a [[Zaros]]ian item, but not as an [[Armadyl]]ean item in the [[God Wars Dungeon]]. In addition, the crossbow possesses a [[special attack]] as well as a [[passive effect]], both of which synergise extremely well with the effects of [[enchanted bolts]].

The Zaryte crossbow is primarily used for its special attack, which can deal a guaranteed 110 damage when used with [[ruby bolts (e)]] against high-health enemies. Additionally, it is the strongest weapon against non-draconic enemies weak to heavy Ranged attacks, such as [[the Leviathan]].

==Passive effect==
The Zaryte crossbow has a [[passive effect]] that strengthens the effects of [[enchanted bolt]]s by 10%. For example, with [[ruby bolts (e)|enchanted ruby bolts]], the bolt's special effect, ''Blood Forfeit'', would deal 22% of the opponent's current [[hitpoints]] with a cap of 110 damage, rather than the usual 20% damage and 100 hitpoints damage cap. 

Because of the way the game handles rounding, the passive effect does not apply to [[Jade bolts (e)|jade]], [[Topaz bolts (e)|red topaz]], and [[sapphire bolts (e)|sapphire]] bolts.

==Special attack==
[[File:Evoke.gif|thumb|280px|A player performing the Zaryte crossbow's special attack, ''Evoke'', with [[Diamond bolts (e)|enchanted diamond bolts]].]]
The Zaryte crossbow has a [[special attack]], ''Evoke'', which consumes 75% of the player's special attack energy. The special attack provides doubled accuracy for the attack, and guarantees the special effect of any [[enchanted bolt]]s used, provided that the player lands a [[successful hit]] on the target.

[[Enchanted ruby bolts]] are the most popular bolts to use with ''Evoke'' in most [[boss]] encounters, as successful hits can guarantee that up to 110 damage is dealt. Unless the enemy has high Ranged defence or low health (with diminishing returns below 500), this makes the Zaryte crossbow one of the most powerful special attack weapons in the game, dealing an extremely high amount of damage reliably. For prolonged encounters, wearing the [[lightbearer]] will make this combination even more effective.

Coupled with natural ruby bolt procs, this special attack is also popular for speed-based [[Combat Achievement]] tasks where frequent high hits are necessary.

==Trivia==
* Unlike other [[Crossbow (weapon)|crossbows]], the Zaryte crossbow grants defensive bonuses.
* It is one of two crossbows with a [[Prayer]] bonus, the other being the [[Armadyl crossbow]] from which it is crafted.
